reviews.comment:
Buena atención,bien los baños limpios,muy concurrida por la ubicación,tienen un shop para comer y tomar algo ahí o para llevar

(Translated by Google)
Good service, clean bathrooms, very busy due to its location, they have a shop where you can eat and drink there or take away.

reviews.comment:
Falta organización..hicimos fila ..y el playero nos dijo que no tenían ahí.. que debíamos dar la vuelta al otro lado lo que implicaba dar vuelta a la manzana y volver hacer fila nos pasó a varios

(Translated by Google)
There's a lack of organization...we lined up...and the attendant told us they didn't have any there...that we had to go around to the other side, which meant walking around the block and lining up again. This happened to several of us.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvNnZqbHR3RRAB
